description_long: This is an upright piano with a classic wooden exterior, featuring a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys. The piano has a rectangular body with a slightly protruding keyboard section and a flat top surface. The back of the piano is plain and solid, while the front displays the keyboard and a lower panel. The asset also includes a round, blue-cushioned piano stool with ornate wooden legs, a thin wooden baton or pointer, and two small rectangular objects that resemble sheet music or books. The wood grain texture is visible, giving the piano a traditional and sturdy appearance. No visible brand or logo is present, and there are no pedals visible beneath the keyboard.
description: A traditional upright wooden piano with a full keyboard, accompanied by a blue-cushioned stool and small accessories. The piano has a classic, sturdy design with visible wood grain and no visible pedals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, lower panel, blue-cushioned stool, baton, and two small rectangular objects.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the piano and the round shape of the stool, with the keyboard visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid back panel of the piano and the tops of the stool and accessories.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the side profile of the piano and the round blue top of the stool.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard piano keyboard with alternating white and black keys, approximately 52 white and 36 black keys, no notable missing or non-standard features.
